sentence_text: I dont take naps, but every morning I feel sick with stress Im not even sure why.
My instant reaction is to cry out of frustration during tests, which is so frivolous and annoying.
I mean my emotions are much more strong than usual.
Also i dont feel anxious when i meditate.
My body convulses so much that it looks like I'm seizing.
Its actually starting to get really frustrating, and I just feel really stupid.
I think I have depression. Stream of consciousness rant
Im not suicidal or homicidal or anything like that, but I'm just sick and tired of feeling this way.
I have never been diagnosed with anxiety or anything, but I am a fairly "high-strung" person, however I didn't notice anything out of the ordinary in regards to my mental health.
I can't sleep bc it beats so hard and then it's all I can focus on.
I know my thoughts get louder when I'm stressed, overwhelmed, hungry, angry, lonely, or tired.
It used to bother me, but I started feeling more rested after I accepted it as normal for me at this point in my life.
The more I check the time, the more anxious I get and the harder it is to sleep.
I snap at people or sometimes hit myself in the middle of a panic attack.
Sometimes I still relapse, but I don't beat myself up over it and I don't feel trapped anymore.
Since childhood, I've been sad, anxious, or sick.
